features.description: Facility catalogue + resource booking. Off for Small-tier tenants.
POS day-pass sale, membership-linked passes, one-off blackout windows, recurring booking rules.
Rules that auto-create N bookings from a template (e.g. every Tuesday 18:00–19:00 for 12 weeks). Enterprise-only.
Refuse booking when attendees_count > facility.capacity_persons. Off means capacity is a UI hint only.
Allow passes to be reassigned to different users. When off, is_transferable defaults to false on all new passes.
SDUI surface for editing pricing_json. When off, pricing is API-only. Financial-audit-critical when on.
Calendar widget showing available slots. When off, booking creation is manual date/time entry only.
